title: Better Spawner
description: Add configurable spawners to the game!
body:
Add configurable Spawners that will spawn exactly what you want and how you want it!


Customizable options include:


+ total max mob amounts (for total mobs, not individual)
+ whether to break after hitting max mob count
+ whether it can spawn infinite mobs (overrides previous values)
+ custom attribute modifiers (to modify attack damage, speed, etc, each can have chances to get applied)
+ distance from spawner that mobs will spawn
+ amount of mobs that will spawn of the batch spawn
+ distance within the player has to be for the spawner to spawn
+ mob types to spawn (can declare multiple)
+ max amount of different types of mobs (negative values or not present mean infinite, still capped by total max mobs if not in infinite mode)
+ spawner name (name of item)
+ tick delay between batch spawns
+ single use (whether to break/not function after one batch)
